channel.name: OpenEyes PAS

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: PASAPI XSLT Step
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:variable name="vLower" select="'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'"/> <xsl:variable name="vUpper" select="'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'"/>
<xsl:template match="/"> <xsl:element name="Patient"> <xsl:if test="//MSH.9.2/text()='A31'"> <xsl:attribute name="updateOnly">1</xsl:attribute> </xsl:if> <NHSNumber><xsl:value-of select="//PID.3[PID.3.5/text()='NHS']/PID.3.1"/></NHSNumber> <!--NHSNumberStatus><xsl:value-of select="//PID.3[PID.3.5/text()='NHS']/PID.3.2"/></NHSNumberStatus--> <HospitalNumber><xsl:value-of select="//PID.3[PID.3.5/text()='DN']/PID.3.1"/></HospitalNumber> <Title><xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring(//PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(//PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower))"/></Title> <FirstName><xsl:value-of select="//PID.5.2"/><xsl:if test="//PID.5.3/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(' ',//PID.5.3)"/></xsl:if></FirstName> <Surname><xsl:value-of select="//PID.5.1"/></Surname> <DateOfBirth><xsl:if test="//PID.7.1/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(substring(//PID.7.1,1,4),'-',substring(//PID.7.1,5,2),'-',substring(//PID.7.1,7,2))"/></xsl:if></DateOfBirth> <Gender><xsl:value-of select="//PID.8.1"/></Gender> <AddressList> <xsl:for-each select="//PID.11[PID.11.7/text()='H' or PID.11.7/text()='CORR']"> <Address> <Line1><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.1"/></Line1> <Line2><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.2"/></Line2> <City><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.3"/></City> <County><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.4"/></County> <Postcode><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.5"/></Postcode> <Country>GB</Country> <Type><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="PID.11.7/text()='H'">HOME</xsl:when><xsl:otherwise><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.7"/></xsl:otherwise></xsl:choose></Type> </Address> </xsl:for-each> </AddressList> <TelephoneNumber><xsl:if test="number(translate(normalize-space(//PID.13.1/text()), ' ', ''))=translate(normalize-space(//PID.13.1/text()), ' ', '')"><xsl:value-of select="//PID.13.1/text()"/></xsl:if></TelephoneNumber> <EthnicGroup><xsl:value-of select="//PID.22.1"/></EthnicGroup> <DateOfDeath><xsl:if test="//PID.29.1/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(substring(//PID.29.1,1,4),'-',substring(//PID.29.1,5,2),'-',substring(//PID.29.1,7,2))"/></xsl:if></DateOfDeath> <PracticeCode><xsl:value-of select="substring(//PD1.3.3,1,6)"/></PracticeCode> <GpCode><xsl:value-of select="substring(//PD1.4.1,1,8)"/></GpCode> </xsl:element> </xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: HospitalNumber
VisitDate
VisitTime
ClinicCode
DoctorCode
VisitStatusXML
PartialRecord
Check for warnings
PatientId
com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.script:
var ResponseXML = new XML(response.getMessage().toString());
channelMap.put('PatientId', validate( ResponseXML.Id.toString() , '', new Array()));

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg['MSH']['MSH.9']['MSH.9.2'].toString()" does not equal "M05"

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: Appointment Filter

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: Resource not found

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
